comment: Editing Language. Each ROLE maps to a LIST of recipe variants; the editor cycles through them (seeded per video) so repeated beats (e.g. four Rockets) look different ON PURPOSE, while the hook stays grand and the hero stays the payoff. A STYLE PACK is just a different copy of this file (EffectsEngine(recipes_path=...)). Effects fire at 'offset' seconds from the clip's IMPACT ANCHOR (negative = before). '{label}' expands to the clip's label. zoom intensity = extra scale (0.15=115%); shake = pixel amplitude (needs a zoom for margin); flash = added brightness 0-1.

hook_cinematic.comment: Grand opener: big slow zoom, light settle, held title.

impact_punch.comment: Aggressive: fast hard zoom + heavy shake + flash + tag.

impact_dramatic.comment: Dramatic silence: slow creeping zoom, NO text, NO flash.

impact_flashy.comment: Flashy: double flash + shake + tag, minimal zoom.

hero_finish.comment: The payoff: biggest zoom, flash, held FINAL tag.

splash.comment: Phase change: soft push + big word.

finale.comment: Victory: hold the word over the game's own confetti.
